items.description: **Note:** Location binding is a product decision in progress. A future revision may add a `pms_location_code` (or equivalent) field so multi-location partners can specify which facility a unit belongs to. Until then, units are resolved within the authenticated company's default location scope.

crm_unit_id.description: The PMS's unique identifier for this unit

occupied.description: Is there a tenant in this unit?

pms_tenant_id.description: The PMS's unique identifier for this tenant

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567). Required for tenants who need app access.

email.description: Tenant's email. Auto-generated if not provided.

move_in_date.description: Tenant's move-in date. Required when occupied is true.

paid_through_date.description: Date the account is paid through

pms_lockout.description: PMS says deny access (overlock, lien, legal hold, etc)

pms_lock_exempt.description: PMS says never lock out this tenant

pms_unrentable.description: Unit cannot be rented (maintenance, damage, etc)

pms_status_raw.description: The PMS's original status string. Stored for audit/debugging only.

items.title: SyncUnit
